rationale: No direct conflict. §45.001(a)(2) authorizes bond tax levies but does not reference homestead exemptions. Increasing the exemption shrinks the taxable base, potentially requiring higher rates to generate sufficient bond debt service revenue.
quote: levy, pledge, assess, and collect annual ad valorem taxes sufficient to pay the principal of and interest on the bonds as or before the principal and interest become due, subject to Section 45.003.
_note: No direct statutory conflict; interaction is fiscal—larger homestead exemption reduces ISD bond debt-service tax base, may necessitate rate adjustments under existing authority.
